mapper.select: SELECT TRUE AS is_played, total_played_time AS total_played_time, correct_count FROM daily_game_log WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND played_date = #{targetDate} AND is_valid = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT TRUE AS is_answered, qb.question_text FROM daily_question_log dq JOIN question_bank qb ON dq.question_id = qb.question_id WHERE dq.member_id = #{memberId} AND dq.record_date = #{targetDate} AND dq.status = 'COMPLETED' LIMIT 1

SELECT TRUE AS is_written, sleep_level, sleep_memo, mood_level, mood_memo, meal_level, meal_memo, exercise_level, exercise_memo, social_level, social_memo FROM daily_record WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND record_date = #{targetDate} LIMIT 1
